# Can I Use: Parquet Format Support Matrix

A comprehensive compatibility reference for Apache Parquet features across libraries and query engines.
**This matrix is auto-generated by running actual tests against each library version.**

> **Legend:** ✅ X.Y.Z+ = Supported (verified since version X.Y.Z) | ❌ = Not supported | ➖ = Not tested

---

## Tools & Versions Tested

| Tool | Latest Version | Versions Tested | Language |
|---|---|---|---|
| PyArrow | 23.0.1 | 23.0.1 | Python |
| fastparquet | 2025.12.0 | 2025.12.0 | Python |
| Polars | 1.38.1 | 1.38.1 | Rust / Python |
| DuckDB | 1.4.4 | 1.4.4 | C++ |
| parquet-rs | 55.2.0 | 55.2.0 | Rust |
| parquet-go | 0.24.0 | 0.24.0 | Go |
| parquet-java | parquet-mr version 1.15.0 (build 4665401d36e468c988322f78621da7c2d1c22ede) | parquet-mr version 1.15.0 (build 4665401d36e468c988322f78621da7c2d1c22ede) | Java |
| parquet-dotnet | 5.0.0.0 | 5.0.0.0 | C# / .NET |

## How to Reproduce

```bash
cd parquet_can_i_use
python run_multiversion.py  # Test multiple versions
python generate_matrix.py --load-results  # Generate matrix from results
```

*Auto-generated from verified test results.*
